sc.panel: Calculates the time to reach next SE or a specific goal.
sc.battery1: Battery cost can be found in the SE menu.
sc.current: Current DC can be found in the SR and SE menus.
sc.gain: DC output can be found in the SR menu.
sc.time: Time in current SE can be found in the SE menu.
sc.replicator_dc:
DC replicator can be found in the SR menu.
You may need to set the value manually because of the retain mechanic.
sc.replicator_sc:
SE replicator can be found in the SE menu.
You may need to set the value manually because of the retain mechanic.
sc.onlineBonus:
First 10 online hours add 38 skip minutes each hour.
Alpha Supplies increases this online bonus by 1% per level.
sc.timeskip: Time skips are inefficient for SE progression because they don't affect replicators.
sc.future: Customs boost can be used include any future boosts that you will get during the run.
penrose.panel: Track current status, next cycle goal, and ETA based on your cycle pace.
penrose.status: Current cycle status in Penrose progression.
penrose.cycleRate: Average cycles progressed per hour during your current run.
og.panel: Input your run state and compare the highest-value OG upgrades.
og.junoGains: Juno gain in the selected unit.
og.calculationMode: During your Juno run keep Juno mode, then switch to DC near the end.
premium.panelCrystalToken: Chest and bot output with premium upgrades.
premium.panelHaulerMine: Layer income by time with premium toggles.
premium.supplyBotTokenUpgrade: In the Token Shop under Supplies Upgrades. Gives +0.1 token per level.
premium.supplyBotCrystalUpgrade: In the Token Shop under Supplies Upgrades. Gives +1 crystal per level.
premium.bbDurationUpgrade: In the Token Shop under BB-Bot Upgrades. Adds 60 seconds and +0.05 tokens per level.
premium.bbTokenUpgrade: In the Token Shop under BB-Bot Upgrades. Requires BB-Bot Duration level 40 and adds 0.5 tokens per level.
premium.tokenBooster: In the Crystal Shop special upgrades tab. Adds 1% token gain per level to all token sources.
premium.chestEnhancer: In the Gamma Corporation module collection. Gives +10% chest tokens per level.
premium.averageHoursPerDay: How many hours per day you actively collect with optimal timing.
premium.seItem: Selected SE threshold for daily token reward multiplier.
premium.includeDailyRewards: Adds 100 crystals and 34.375 tokens daily, then applies token booster and selected SE multiplier to the token part.
premium.luckyLeafClover: Reduces chest cooldown by 10% for Basic and Rare chest cycles.
premium.unlockedLayers: Highest unlocked layer in the hauler mine route.
premium.haulerTokenBooster: Shared with Crystal and Token tab. Applies to all hauler token rewards.
zatGuide.panel: Cycle- and run-based node recommendations with an interactive tree view.
credits.panel: Contributors, references, and acknowledgements from data/credits.json.
